mechanism_narrative: A sustained low level of the federal funds rate reduces the discount rate applied to future corporate earnings, directly increasing present equity valuations and generating positive forward returns.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns during low-rate periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: An unemployment rate exceeding 8.0 percent signals severe labor market deterioration and collapsing consumer spending, triggering immediate negative equity repricing over the next week.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5-day returns in > 65% of triggered instances despite the negative signal, or out-of-sample directional accuracy falls below 50%.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in real sales of final goods and housing starts indicates synchronized consumer and capital demand, generating positive quarterly equity returns through earnings growth.
failure_condition: Joint proxy signal yields a Rank IC below 0.04 over any 2-year rolling window, or 60-day forward returns are not significantly positive when both series rise concurrently.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production growth during a monetary easing cycle reflects accommodative liquidity translating into higher factory output, driving positive monthly equity returns.
failure_condition: Directional accuracy drops below 52% during easing periods, or the signal loses predictive power when FEDFUNDS declines by more than 0.5 percentage points.

mechanism_narrative: A consumer price index above 220.0 triggers expectations of aggressive central bank tightening, compressing equity valuations within one week through higher discount rates.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns remain positive in > 60% of threshold-crossing instances, or the signal's out-of-sample Sharpe ratio falls below 0.1.

mechanism_narrative: Rising nonfarm payrolls consistently correlate with expanding corporate revenue bases and lower labor costs per unit, producing positive quarterly forward returns for the S&P 500.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window, or 60-day forward returns during payroll growth periods are not significantly higher than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: Negative real GDP growth combined with declining real sales of final goods confirms a broad demand collapse, forcing negative monthly equity returns through earnings downgrades.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20-day returns in > 55% of triggered instances, or the interaction term fails to improve model fit over single-proxy baselines (F-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: An industrial production index falling below 90.0 signals acute manufacturing bottlenecks and supply chain fragmentation, triggering immediate negative equity repricing over the next week.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are positive in > 60% of threshold-crossing instances, or the signal's directional accuracy falls below 50% out-of-sample.
